generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder delivering motor shaft angle r_M per drive"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder delivering gearwheel angle r_G per drive"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (simulated data sources treated as virtual sensors)
instance SimulatedMotorAngleSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model emitting simulated motor angle ^r_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedMotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedGearAngleSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model emitting simulated gear angle ^r_G"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedGearAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngleSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model emitting simulated output angle ^r_out"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulatedOutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C4: DataTransmitted
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedMotorAngleSource
]

instance SimulatedGearAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedGearAngleSource
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulatedOutputAngleSource
]

// C10: Data
instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angle trace r_M received via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance MeasuredGearAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gear angle trace r_G received via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace I_M received via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulatedMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angle trace ^r_M generated by Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedMotorAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnifiedDashboard, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulatedGearAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gear angle trace ^r_G generated by Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedGearAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnifiedDashboard, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SimulatedOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output angle trace ^r_out generated by Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnifiedDashboard, AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque trace derived from measured current I_M and angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity trace derived from successive angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration trace derived from angular velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// C10: Models
instance MotorGearboxSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block and internal block diagram describing the motor‑gearbox structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel within the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model (static, kinetic, viscous) for the drivetrain"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for detailed friction characterization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for pre‑slip behaviour"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for dynamic friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MatlabSimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink execution environment used for simulation and friction parameter extraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, FrictionParameterGenerationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker handling real‑time streaming of sensor data from the robot"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Industry 4.0 AAS managing digital twin data persistence and interoperability"
]

instance UnifiedDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualising measured and simulated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modelling tool supporting engineering model definition"
]

// C6: Services
instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualisation of measured and simulated data for the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of friction parameters to improve robot motion control accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateRobotControllerAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Extracted friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) indicating drivetrain behaviour"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization‑derived insight on robot motion accuracy and wear trends"
]

// C17: Actions
instance UpdateRobotControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed back friction parameters to the robot controller to compensate wear and temperature effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time operation synchronized with the sensor sampling rates; data are streamed live via MQTT and processed on‑line for friction model updating."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow comprising a purpose (FrictionDerivation), an asset (MABI robot first axis), data traces, processing components (simulation models) and metadata, all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is employed during the operational stage of the robot to perform online friction identification and control optimisation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Combines white‑box analytical friction models with black‑box data‑driven models; continuous identification ensures model fidelity; traceability of each data point to its source and processing component enables validation by comparing simulated versus measured data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted to the digital shadow via the MQTT protocol; integration with the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) provides standardized access to the asset information."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset representation and SysML for model specification."
]
